title: Dandeeswarar Temple
tagline: Dandeeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Dhandeeswarar Temple (Shri Dhandeeswarar Temple) is a Shiva temple situated in Velachery, a suburb of Chennai.
overview.description: Dhandeeswarar Temple (Shri Dhandeeswarar Temple) is a Shiva temple situated in Velachery, a suburb of Chennai. The temple was built during the Pallava reign and was repaired and rebuilt during the Chola reign. The temple complex consists of a main temple complex and a tank, and is 2 kilometers towards the east from Guru Nanak College on the Velachery main road. This temple is administered by the HR & CE Department of the Government of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Nandeesvarar Temple, Nandivanam
topPlaces.description: Nandeesvarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located at Nandivanam in Chennai City, Kanchipuram district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Nandivaram-Guduvancheri
topPlaces.description: Nandivaram-Guduvancheri is a municipality located in Chennai Metropolitan City in Chengalpattu district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is lies in the southern part of Chennai metropolitan area.

topPlaces.name: Guduvancheri
topPlaces.description: Guduvancheri is a southern suburb of the Indian city of Chennai. It forms part of the Nandivaram-Guduvancheri municipality in Chengalpattu district.

topPlaces.name: Urapakkam
topPlaces.description: Urapakkam is a southern suburb of Chennai and a panchayat in Chengalpattu district. As per the 2011 census, Urapakkam had a population of 29,122 individuals.

topPlaces.name: Thailavaram
topPlaces.description: Thailavaram is a village located between Guduvancheri and Potheri of Maraimalai Nagar municipality in Chengalpattu District in Tamil Nadu, India. It is situated just 2 kilometres (1.2 mi) from Guduvancheri along the GST Road and it is situated 37 kilometres (23 mi) from Chennai, between Tambaram and Chengalpattu highway.

topPlaces.name: Kilambakkam
topPlaces.description: Kilambakkam is a neighborhood in Tambaram, Chennai City, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located between Vandalur and Urapakkam along Grand Southern Trunk Road (GST Road).

topPlaces.name: Kilambakkam bus terminus, Chennai
topPlaces.description: Kilambakkam Bus Terminus, officially Kalaignar Centenary Bus Terminus, is a bus terminus in Kilambakkam, a southern suburb of Chennai, India. Spread over an area of 88.52 acres (358,200 m2), it is situated along the GST Road.

topPlaces.name: Potheri Village, Chengalpattu
topPlaces.description: Potheri is a rapidly-growing village locality in the South suburbs of the Metroepolitan city Chennai. It is a town that comes under Maraimalai Nagar municipality of Chengalpattu taluk in the Chengalpattu district of Tamil Nadu, India and suburb of Chennai within Chennai Metropolitan Area.

itinerary.title: Day 3 — Kilambakkam bus terminus, Chennai & around

items.note: Kilambakkam Bus Terminus, officially Kalaignar Centenary Bus Terminus, is a bus terminus in Kilambakkam, a southern suburb of Chennai, India. Spread over an area of 88.52 acres (358,200 m2), it is situated along the GST Road.

Potheri is a rapidly-growing village locality in the South suburbs of the Metroepolitan city Chennai. It is a town that comes under Maraimalai Nagar municipality of Chengalpattu taluk in the Chengalpattu district of Tamil Nadu, India and suburb of Chennai within Chennai Metropolitan Area.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Dandeeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Dandeeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Dandeeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (20 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (35 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Dandeeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Dandeeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Dandeeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Dandeeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Dandeeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nandeesvarar Temple, Nandivanam, Nandivaram-Guduvancheri, Guduvancheri, Urapakkam, Thailavaram.
